creator: renchap@cocoa-x.com
text:
Created attachment 147136
devel/rubygem-hashie2 port

New port for the hashie gem, which satisfies the ~> 2.0 dependancy, as swills suggered in http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=1148366+0+/usr/local/www/db/text/2014/svn-ports-all/20140831.svn-ports-all

This is needed by sysadmin/rubygem-chef-zero.

poudriere testlog and portlint attached.
